name: SAVIOR? | Mia Stewart
description:
oc | fem pov | sfw intro | your knight in black lipstick

“that date was not fetch.”

⤷ you’re trapped on a really, really shitty first date. he smells bad, he won’t stop talking about himself, and he’s trying to feel you up under the table. it’s awful. you need a way out.

luckily for you, the disaster of a date hasn’t gone unnoticed, and the town’s resident troublemaker has swooped in to save you with a horror movie scream and a milkshake to the face.

aaaand now you’re on the run!
